name: neon-conductor
description: AI agent manager with Kilo integration and BYOK support.

scripts.build: pnpm run generated:check && pnpm run build:app
scripts.build:win: pnpm run vendor:node:win && pnpm run vendor:rg:win && pnpm run build && electron-builder --win -c electron-builder.json5
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run vendor:node:mac && pnpm run vendor:rg:mac && pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --x64 -c electron-builder.json5
scripts.build:mac:arm64: pnpm run vendor:node:mac:arm64 && pnpm run vendor:rg:mac:arm64 && pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 -c electron-builder.json5
scripts.build:mac:x64: pnpm run vendor:node:mac:x64 && pnpm run vendor:rg:mac:x64 && pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64 -c electron-builder.json5
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run vendor:node:linux && pnpm run vendor:rg:linux && pnpm run build && electron-builder --linux -c electron-builder.json5
